claim_summary:
Section 12 — Intraday seasonality per product/day.

Bucket each day's 10,000 ticks into 10 windows of 1,000 ticks; report mean +
std of mid for each bucket per (product, day). Long-format CSV: one row per
(product, day, bucket).
raw_excerpt:
"""Section 12 — Intraday seasonality per product/day.

Bucket each day's 10,000 ticks into 10 windows of 1,000 ticks; report mean +
std of mid for each bucket per (product, day). Long-format CSV: one row per
(product, day, bucket).
"""
from __future__ import annotations

import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
from _common import (DAYS, ROUND5_PRODUCTS, fmt_section_header, add_mid,
                     group_of, load_prices, save_outputs)


N_BUCKETS = 10


def main() -> pd.DataFrame:
    print(fmt_section_header("Section 12 — Intraday Seasonality"))
    rows = []
    for d in DAYS:
        df = add_mid(load_prices(d))
        df = df.sort_values(["product", "timestamp"])
        for p in ROUND5_PRODUCTS:
            sub = df[df["product"] == p].dropna(subset=["mid"]).reset_index(drop=True)
